title: Abort in kernel/fmt.cc:454 with "$display($time)" called
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.34+55 (git sha1 672375ed0, clang 14.0.6 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Verilog file `top.v`:
```verilog
module top;
	initial $display($time);
endmodule
```
Run:
```
yosys -p "read_verilog top.v"
```

### Expected Behavior

Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

### Actual Behavior

```
-- Running command `read_verilog top.v' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: top.v
Parsing Verilog input from `top.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
ERROR: Abort in kernel/fmt.cc:454.
```
